commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the plugin SDK facade manifest lookup to prefer the current plugin metadata snapshot before falling back to filesystem registry loading, and extends facade runtime tests for Windows path matching plus snapshot/config mismatch behavior.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +146. Total +157 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence real Gateway or CLI reproduction is present. Source inspection does show current main calls loadPluginManifestRegistry on each facade registry lookup, while the PR body provides only a synthetic direct-call benchmark.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review remains because the blockers are real runtime proof and compatibility acceptance for a plugin facade cache path, not a narrow code defect for automation to repair.
